name: Har Ghadi Mauj
overview: Gujarati actor Ojas Rawal has begun a chat show for Oho Gujarati where he interviews celebrities every week. The first celeb to join the show was RJ-turned-actress Devaki.

trailers.title: Behind the scenes of Har Ghadi Mauj streaming on @OHO Gujarati Asif Silavat Lamex
